summary: Frontend-only verification of Phase 3 DataTable migration on 3 Executive portal pages (ExecutiveHome Top Outlets, ReservationSummary Per Outlet, BudgetApprovals). All acceptance criteria pass — no crashes, correct testids, sortable headers, row-click navigation, and proper empty states for budgets/reservations (demo DB has no rows for these).

issues: Recharts console warnings: 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' from BrandMixDonut / SalesTrendChart container measuring before mount. Cosmetic only — charts render correctly after layout settles. Consider adding minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer.

critical_code_review_comments: DataTable.jsx is well-structured (~290 lines), uses memo + useMemo, correctly handles sort/expand/row-click states. No code-quality issues.
ExecutiveHome.jsx (~460 lines) is approaching the 700-line threshold; consider extracting the Top Outlets card and the filter/KPI strips into sub-components for future maintainability.
Recharts ResponsiveContainer warnings should be silenced by ensuring a minHeight on chart wrappers (non-blocking).
test_credentials: admin@torado.id / Torado@2026 (SUPER_ADMIN) — login OK, redirected to /portal-select then Executive routes accessible.
seed_data_creation: None. Demo DB had 5 outlets for Top Outlets (Calluna, Altero, ...). Reservations & submitted budgets were empty — empty states verified as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 DataTable migration validated for executive batch (ExecutiveHome/ReservationSummary/BudgetApprovals). Remaining executive pages PeriodCompare, OutletBudgetAllocation, OutletBudgetMonitor are intentionally not migrated (matrix/form/heatmap UIs by design). When budgets/reservations seed data exists in future runs, also validate: (a) reject-dialog reason input + confirm-reject-btn submission, (b) approve-btn-{id} happy path, (c) sortable headers `approval-row-sort-*`, (d) inline drill-down `budget-lines-{id}` rendering of COA lines, (e) `reservation-outlet-row-{outlet_id}` rows.

BudgetApprovals /executive/budget-approv.pending_table_empty_state: verified — budget-approvals-empty 'Tidak ada budget yang menunggu approval' visible
BudgetApprovals /executive/budget-approv.approved_card_conditional: not shown (correct — no approved budgets in demo DB)
